channel.title: Vitamin D and Boron on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Vitamin D and Boron on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Boron and Metabolic Disorders
item.description:
• Boron-Containing Compounds for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Treatment of Human Metabolic Disorders - June 2022
      • 20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category
      • Metabolic Syndrome Associations with other categories

Boron-Containing Compounds for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Treatment of Human Metabolic Disorders - June 2022

https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-022-03346-9 Can be viewed in DeepDyve

20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category

Metabolic Syndrome Associations with other categories


Markdown:
--------
{{< toc >}}

---

#### Boron-Containing Compounds for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Treatment of Human Metabolic Disorders - June 2022

[https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-022-03346-9](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-022-03346-9)  Can be viewed  in [DeepDyve](https://www.deepdyve.com/lp/springer-journals/boron-containing-compounds-for-prevention-diagnosis-and-treatment-of-DDXOmGUuSS?key=springer)

* <img src="/attachments/d3.mock.jpg" alt="image" width="800">

---

#### 20 recently changed items in [Vitamin D and Boron](/categories/vitamin-d-and-boron) category

 

---

#### Metabolic Syndrome Associations with other categories

item.title: Boron appears to increase Vitamin D by inhibiting a gene - 2004
item.description:
• Up-regulatory impact of boron on vitamin D function - - does it reflect inhibition of 24-hydroxylase?
      • 20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category
      • VitaminDWiki - Genetics chart shows the vitamin D genes
      • 66 Citations of this study as of March 2024

Up-regulatory impact of boron on vitamin D function - - does it reflect inhibition of 24-hydroxylase?

Med Hypotheses. 2004;63(6):1054-6. doi: 10.1016/j.mehy.2003.12.053.

Dusan Miljkovic 1, Natasha Miljkovic, Mark F McCarty

item.title: Boron For Vitamin D Deficiency
item.description:
• Boron For Vitamin D Deficiency contains:
      • HOW BORON CAN HELP
      • THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN BORON AND VITAMIN D
      • CONCLUSION
      • 20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category

Boron For Vitamin D Deficiency contains:

on LinkedIn

HOW BORON CAN HELP

Research, consisting of both animal and human studies, has revealed the beneficial role of boron in increasing the serum levels of Vitamin D. The underlying mechanism appears multifaceted. One plausible explanation suggests that boron aids in retaining and efficiently utilizing magnesium and copper, minerals essential for various bodily functions. Specifically, boron is known to keep magnesium within the cell, preventing rapid depletion of our magnesium reserves, particularly pertinent during stress response. Concurrently, copper—an indispensable mineral for cellular energy generation—may also be conserved better as boron supplementation can prevent the over-consumption of critical nutrients, like copper, during increased stress.One pioneering open pilot study recorded similar findings. This study involved middle-aged participants presumed to be Vitamin D deficient.

item.title: Boron improves Human Health
item.description:
• The Physiological Role of Boron on Health - March 2018
      • 20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category

The Physiological Role of Boron on Health - March 2018

https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-018-1284-3

  • Table of Contents

  • Download the PDF from Sci-Hub via VitaminDWiki

20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category


Markdown:
--------
{{< toc >}}

---

#### The Physiological Role of Boron on Health - March 2018

[https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-018-1284-3](https://doi.org/10.1007/s12011-018-1284-3) 

  *  **Table of Contents** 

  * <img src="/attachments/d3.mock.jpg" alt="image" width="400">

  *  **[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf" style="margin-right: 0.3em;"></i>Download the PDF from Sci-Hub via VitaminDWiki ](/attachments/d3.mock.pdf)** 

---

#### 20 recently changed items in [Vitamin D and Boron](/categories/vitamin-d-and-boron) category

item.title: Pivotal role of Boron supplementation on bone health
item.description:
• Pivotal role of boron supplementation on bone health: A narrative review
      • 20 recently changed items in Vitamin D and Boron category

Pivotal role of boron supplementation on bone health: A narrative review

Journal of Trace Elements in Medicine and Biology Vol 62, Dec 2020, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jtemb.2020.126577

Mariangela Rondanelli a b, Milena Anna Faliva c, Gabriella Peroni c, Vittoria Infantino b, Clara Gasparri c, Giancarlo Iannello d, Simone Perna e, Antonella Riva f, Giovanna Petrangolini f, Alice Tartara c

item.title: Supplements taken by the founder of VitaminDWiki
item.description:
• Supplements: taken daily thru once a week
      • See also in VitaminDWiki
    • Receptor and Activation
      • VitaminDWiki - The risk of 50+ diseases at least double with poor Vitamin D Receptor
      • VitaminDWiki - Vitamin D Receptor activation can be increased in 15 ways
      • VitaminDWiki – Vitamin D Receptor category:
      • Diseases associated with a poor Vitamin D Receptor

Supplements: taken daily thru once a week

(Manufacturer - rarely important, typically popular on Amazon)

Daily

  • Magnesium Co-Factor VDR activate** 400 mg in water
